'''鈭歨-s-k-f''' ('''kahaskefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:twoweapon|twoweapon]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twoweapon|twoweapon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-s-k-f
|-
! Lemma
| kahaskefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihaskefoko|thihaskefoko]] || [[word:jihaskefoko|jihaskefoko]] || [[word:shihaskefoko|shihaskefoko]] || [[word:kihaskefoko|kihaskefoko]]
